input_natural_language: Exceeding sensor limits shall latch an autopilot pullup when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail).

This ensures that the autopilot engages automatically when the conditions for safety are not met.

atomic_propositions.standby: True when the pilot is in control of the vehicle
atomic_propositions.apfail: Failure indication from an external source
atomic_propositions.supported: Indication of general health of system, must be True to enable operation
atomic_propositions.pullup: True when the autopilot is in the MANEUVER state
